blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,016 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
